label: 1517 CE
era_summary: Year 1517 (MDXVII) was a common year starting on Thursday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1517: Spain (Sicily), 1516-17. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1517: Turkey (Corsairs)-Spain, Hafsids (Algiers, Djidjelli, Tlemcen), 1514-21; Spain (Sicily), 1516-17; Portugal-Zaila (Somaliland), 1517. Maddison records GDP/capita 1462 (ESP, 1517) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
